expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly structures Phase 1 context intake around the three required categories and states they are what must be captured before scenario drafting: "Phase 1 context intake (what would be captured before scenario drafting)" with sections "A. Google Sheets export entry points (must be preserved)", "B. Scope boundaries (in-scope vs out-of-scope)", and "C. Format constraints (must be preserved)".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The deliverable is labeled and organized as Phase 1: title "EXPORT-P1-CONTEXT-INTAKE-001 — Phase 1 (Context Intake) Deliverable" and "Primary phase under test: phase1 (context intake)", and the content consists of evidence intake status, context categories to capture, checkpoint conclusion, and blockers—consistent with context intake rather than scenario drafting.
